name: VR Paradise - Steam Edition
short_description: VR Paradise is a virtual Strip Club for educated grown ups who own a VR headset.
detailed_description:
VR Paradise is a virtual Strip Club for educated grown-ups who own a VR headset.
It has been created by a French independent studio, specializing in game and software development for over 20 years.

The goal was to create the most immersive and arousing strip club experience.

The game’s high-quality and life-like result was achieved by using motion-capture on some of the most talented and professional strippers and applying high poly real-time meshes and ultra-realistic textures afterward.
Just like in a real strip club, enjoy the simultaneous pole-dance shows onstage, table dances, and explicitly nude private dances, all on demand.

You can also go into the locker room and customize any of the strippers:

  • Their hair cut
  • Their eye, hair, and skin color.
  • Their breast and bottom size.
  • Their outfits.
  • Add multiple accessories (earrings, glasses, garter...etc.)
  • Add tattoos. "
